name: Jordan Russell
subject: Jessi Melton Campaign Volunteer Information
body:
Peter,

Thank you for your interest in helping out with Jessi's campaign. We are
reliant on grassroots volunteers and the energy you bring to win this
primary for Jessi. I just created you a volunteer account in our system,
i360, they should have generated an email to you now.

I have copied our volunteer coordinator, Madison, on this email. The two
main ways volunteers can help is either by making phone calls or knocking
on doors for Jessi. We make this process extremely easy for our volunteers
- we provide the phone apps and the lists are loaded into those apps. All
you have to do is log in, follow instructions, and let the phone do the
dialing. We are targeting ONLY highly likely Republican primary voters so
we are very efficient with your time. No calling people or knocking on
doors of people who are not interested in voting in our primary.

Please see the instructions below and please feel free to reach out to
Madison or me if you have any questions. Thank you again for your interest
in helping Jessi.

*Everyone who signs up to volunteer needs to watch these two videos first.
They are very brief.*

*Walk App Video Training: *
*https://help.i-360.com/hc/en-us/articles/360049588874-i360-Walk-Video-Training*
<https://help.i-360.com/hc/en-us/articles/360049588874-i360-Walk-Video-Training>

*Call App Video Training: *
*https://help.i-360.com/hc/en-us/articles/360047011033-i360-Call-Video-Training*
<https://help.i-360.com/hc/en-us/articles/360047011033-i360-Call-Video-Training>

*Please note - To make sure Jessi's VM is left on all answering
machines/voicemails, Volunteers will need to wait until they hear the beep
of the answering machine. Then they will need to click the Answering
Machine option in the app to play the message. Once the message is being
left the volunteer will be moved to the next call.*

--
<http://www.reedruss.com>
Jordan Russell, Partner
reedruss.com <http://www.reedruss.com>

Dear Friend, I hope you had an enjoyable, appropriately socially distanced and masked holiday weekend. Just a reminder that after a couple of days off, early voting resumed yesterday with a half day of polling in most locations, and continues now through this Friday. Sarah and I voted yesterday. It was safe and easy! I encourage you to, if at all possible, get out to vote early this week to avoid election day crowds and to give yourself enough time to fix any challenges that might arise during the voting process. A note from recent FEC filings - my likely general election opponent Pete Sessions, who when announcing his candidacy said the his goal was to "restore the Republican majority in the house" and didn't care to mention the people of Central Texas, has raised over $228,000 from PACs so far this election cycle. I think it's clear who he'll work for if he wins. **Let's keep that from happening. If we all pitch in, we can beat Pete. **_**[Demand Better. Demand _Much_ Better. Click here or a button below to pitch in.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18147044/218777549/-1907457920?refcode=07062020_line&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDNkMGZlZS04ZWJmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Z2ccI4VKDRFI5kOiXHceMul6K74rWhJSQJjLxPEajI=)**_ _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | **[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18147045/218777550/1282771135?refcode=07062020_abx1&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDNkMGZlZS04ZWJmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Z2ccI4VKDRFI5kOiXHceMul6K74rWhJSQJjLxPEajI=)** | **[$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18147046/218777551/1282771135?refcode=07062020_abx2&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDNkMGZlZS04ZWJmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Z2ccI4VKDRFI5kOiXHceMul6K74rWhJSQJjLxPEajI=)** | **[$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18147047/218777552/1282771135?refcode=07062020_abx3&amount=50&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDNkMGZlZS04ZWJmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Z2ccI4VKDRFI5kOiXHceMul6K74rWhJSQJjLxPEajI=)**

name: i360
subject: Volunteer Credential Notification
body:
Dear Peter,
Thank you for registering to volunteer! We appreciate your commitment to freedom. Below are your login credentials.
**Login:** 4164.Peter
**Password:** sfufQ057
Now that you have your login, you’ll want to download the volunteer mobile apps, i360 Call and i360 Walk. You can find these in the Apple iOS App Store and the Google Play Store. Once those apps are downloaded, you can log in with your volunteer login and password listed in this email and start volunteering for a great cause! Please remember that usernames and passwords are case sensitive.
If you ever have any questions or need help with our volunteer apps, email [support@i-360.com](mailto:support@i-360.com) and include your Login ID, the name of your organization, and your local field coordinator.
Thank you!

body:

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: My request for you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Let me explain...
Friend,
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to Reverend Raphael Warnock's campaign for U.S. Senate in Georgia. **But first, let me explain why I am proud to endorse him and why your support is so critical.**
In 2018, we built a diverse coalition of hardworking folks from all over Georgia, especially Georgians from marginalized communities who felt unseen and unheard. Our fight was rooted in the belief that poverty is immoral, that Georgians deserve access to affordable health care and that the economy ought to work for everyone.
The fact is, people in the White House and the U.S. Senate are failing Georgians of every political party, every race and every region.
The Republican Party's divisive agenda - and systematic voter suppression - goes against everything we stand for as Americans. But here's what gives me hope: All around the country, good people - including many folks who have never been involved with politics before - are stepping up to fight back and defend American values. We have the grassroots energy we need to restore this nation's democracy - and if we all do our part in 2020 to elect leaders who share these values, I know we can make our vision for the country a reality.
That's why I am so excited Reverend Raphael Warnock, a champion for Georgians in the fight for justice, announced he is running for U.S. Senate. Reverend Warnock is a strong leader, a pastor and an advocate - and he would be the first Black senator our state has ever elected. **[If you are as ready as I am to support Reverend Warnock's campaign, please give $5 or more right now so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats in 2020.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e527/288179be/82fb614/348e597e/609961317/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzYyLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk362-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Reverend Warnock knows the incredible movement we built in Georgia in 2018, and he's determined to build the energy we need all the way to the ballot box in November. He's ready to fight voter suppression, ensure that health care is protected and expanded and break barriers to opportunity so that future generations know that the sky is the limit.
For the past 15 years, I have watched Reverend Warnock lead on issues of social justice, economic access and voting rights. We stood shoulder to shoulder on the toughest fights, against opponents who used their power to belittle and erase their fellow Georgians. He's dedicated his life to public service, and I know _without a doubt_ that he will be a strong advocate for folks in every corner of our state.
**But if we are going to build momentum and flip Georgia blue in 2020, we need to show Reverend Warnock - and a Republican Party that thinks they can steal this seat by spending millions of dollars and suppressing the vote - that we have a grassroots movement strong enough to win. That is why I need supporters like YOU to help us get this campaign off the ground. **
**[So please, friend, will you give $5 now- as much as you can spare - to help Reverend Warnock win this Senate seat, flip Georgia blue and ensure our constitutional rights are protected in the years to come? ](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e527/288179be/82fb614/348e597e/609961317/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzYyLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk362-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you for your support.
Stacey Abrams
| [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e527/288179be/82fb614/348e597e/609961317/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzYyLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk362-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Warnock for Georgia email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e527/288179be/82fb614/348e597f/609961317/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

(C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only.
PO Box 991 Decatur, GA 30031

body:
Friends, I’m not sure if you saw, but last week Congressman Max Rose had a vile outburst on the floor of the House of Representatives directed at Congresswoman Virginia Foxx. Congresswoman Foxx is well respected by both parties, and known as a thoughtful, hard working, and caring leader in Congress who fights for education and job creation.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=205A321A1A4138)

---
| | Friends-

I’m not sure if you saw, but last week Congressman Max Rose had a vile outburst on the floor of the House of Representatives directed at Congresswoman Virginia Foxx.

Congresswoman Foxx is well respected by both parties, and known as a thoughtful, hard working, and caring leader in Congress who fights for education and job creation.

[Instead of joining with Congresswoman Foxx to solve problems, once again Max Rose’s disgusting and disrespectful behavior is driving a partisan divide.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=205A321A1A4139)

---
| | |
---
| | At a time when there is so much unrest in our country we should be working together to pass a bipartisan infrastructure package to fix America’s roads, bridges, and tunnels.

Instead, Max Rose chose to try to score partisan political points.

After being repeatedly reprimanded by his own party for his behavior, Max was forced to publicly apologize and remove his words from the Congressional record. And rightfully so.

The problem here isn’t just that Max Rose is putting politics of the worst kind above the needs of Americans. The problem is that instead of using his time and energy to bring us together to put people back to work and rebuild our nation, Max wasted his time on partisan attacks that achieved nothing. Max was rude, Max was ignorant, and worst of all Max put his own ego ahead of the needs of our constituents.

I’m running for Congress to defeat Max Rose in November because I will be the no-nonsense leader that we desperately need. I’ll work with anyone to get Americans back to work, and I’ll do it with the dignity and respect that partisans like Max Rose disregard.
[
Join me and let’s send a message to the radical liberals in Congress that their dangerous policies and the disrespectful behavior isn’t welcome anymore.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=205A321A1A4139)

clean_body: Friends, I’m not sure if you saw, but last week Congressman Max Rose had a vile outburst on the floor of the House of Representatives directed at Congresswoman Virginia Foxx. Congresswoman Foxx is well respected by both parties, and known as a thoughtful, hard working, and caring leader in Congress who fights for education and job creation. | | | | | | | | | Friends- I’m not sure if you saw, but last week Congressman Max Rose had a vile outburst on the floor of the House of Representatives directed at Congresswoman Virginia Foxx. Congresswoman Foxx is well respected by both parties, and known as a thoughtful, hard working, and caring leader in Congress who fights for education and job creation. | | | | | | | | | | At a time when there is so much unrest in our country we should be working together to pass a bipartisan infrastructure package to fix America’s roads, bridges, and tunnels. Instead, Max Rose chose to try to score partisan political points. After being repeatedly reprimanded by his own party for his behavior, Max was forced to publicly apologize and remove his words from the Congressional record. And rightfully so. The problem here isn’t just that Max Rose is putting politics of the worst kind above the needs of Americans. The problem is that instead of using his time and energy to bring us together to put people back to work and rebuild our nation, Max wasted his time on partisan attacks that achieved nothing. Max was rude, Max was ignorant, and worst of all Max put his own ego ahead of the needs of our constituents. I’m running for Congress to defeat Max Rose in November because I will be the no-nonsense leader that we desperately need. I’ll work with anyone to get Americans back to work, and I’ll do it with the dignity and respect that partisans like Max Rose disregard. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Sincerely, Nicole | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL) Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Nicole for New York, PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306, United States

name: Madison Hinz
subject: i360 Training Zoom Call
body:
Thank you for signing up to help Jessi win this primary! We rely on volunteers to fuel our grassroots efforts, and we are hitting the home stretch of this campaign. Absentee ballots start to go out this Thursday, July 9th, so we want to ramp up our efforts to contact those voters with Jessi's message. If you are interested, we are hosting a zoom call, tomorrow, July 7th, at 6pm EST, to discuss any questions you might have about the i360 Call and Walk apps. We want the process to be seamless and easy for you, and we are here to answer any questions.

The simple goal is this: call as many voters as possible who we know have requested absentee ballots and ask them to consider supporting Jessi, and record their response. If they don't answer, there is a simple voicemail from Jessi that you can leave on their answering machine/voicemails. The app dials for you, all you do is talk to people when they pick up and record their answer to a very simple, 2 question survey. This is an enormous help to Jessi and we can use any amount of time you have to give.

Again, if you are interested in a quick training on this app, please join us on the zoom call tomorrow. I will send out an invite to the zoom meeting shortly.

We are also planning a Super Saturday Volunteer Phone Bank in Boca Raton sometime in the next two weeks. If you'd be interested in joining us for this, please let me know. I will follow up with more details later.

Madison Hinz
Executive Assistant to Jessi Melton for Congress 2020
FL-22 (R)
(954)837-3566
[madison@jessiforcongress.com](mailto:madison@jessiforcongress.com)
<https://secure.anedot.com/jessi-melton-for-congress/donate>

name: MJ Hegar
subject: some good news and some bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We're building something big in Texas, but Sen. Cornyn will spend big to try to stop us.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489014c/7f51f7bc/411162ae/4ef61bb0/397816493/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter: I have some good news and some bad news for you.

The good news is **over 56,000 donors have already pitched in an average online donation of $23 at a time to power this campaign** ([**and you can join them by clicking here**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489014c/7f51f7bc/411162ae/4ef61bb7/397816493/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2NzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200706.1nd__1672__&amount=10")). With your help, we'll be well on our way to winning the runoff and defeating Sen. Cornyn this November.

But the bad news is that **Sen. Cornyn has raked in millions from corporate PACs and special interests** like the insurance industry, pharmaceutical industry, and the gun lobby -- all while the Koch network pays huge sums for ads to boost his chances.

Those special interests are spending so much money on Sen. Cornyn because they know he'll _always_ put their interests ahead of yours. But I'm not taking corporate PAC money because I'm running for Senate to fight for YOU -- and that means I need your help to fight back.

**Will you join our team and make your first donation* today to help us fight back against Sen. Cornyn and his big money backers?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489014c/7f51f7bc/411162ae/4ef61bb7/397816493/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2NzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200706.1nd__1672__&amount=10")**

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931beaf/1cd0ac28/87daa1f7/357cd583/3007860685/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931beaf/1cd0ac28/87daa1f7/357cd586/3007860685/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931beaf/1cd0ac28/87daa1f7/357cd582/3007860685/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931beaf/1cd0ac28/87daa1f7/357cd585/3007860685/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931beaf/1cd0ac28/87daa1f7/357cd581/3007860685/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann?=
subject: The latest from Tracey Mann for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
| |
---
| | | **A Message from Tracey**

It is hard to believe that the August 4 primary is less than one month away. Since announcing my candidacy last September, it has been the honor of a lifetime to travel across the 63 counties in the Big First, meet you, and learn what you want from your next congressman. Please share the word about our campaign with your friends and neighbors. Our momentum is building and will take us to victory on Election Day!
---
|
---
| **Proud to Receive Numerous Endorsements **
I am proud but humbled to be endorsed by numerous conservative organizations and individuals in my campaign for Congress. These endorsements serve as a recognition of my commitment to preserving the sanctity of life, the Second Amendment, and our rural way of life.

* **Kansans for Life **

I am honored to be endorsed by the Kansans for Life Political Action Committee. As a father of four, I have pledged to be unwavering in my support of pro-life legislation and in my opposition to taxpayer-funded abortions. We have a solemn duty to defend those who cannot defend themselves. To learn more about my promise to fight for the unborn and why Kansans for Life PAC supports our campaign, click [here.](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=7cca3b9a5e&e=a9d1410029)
* **National Rifle Association**

It is an honor to be exclusively endorsed by the National Rifle Association Victory Fund. As a member of the NRA, I understand the importance of the Second Amendment and will fight every day to protect Kansas' right to keep and bear arms.
* **Governor Jeff Colyer **

I’m honored that Governor Jeff Colyer, MD, the 44th governor of Kansas and a native son of the First District, has endorsed me in the August primary election. Governor Colyer selected me in 2018 to serve as his lieutenant governor so he has firsthand insight into the kind of congressman I will be. He knows that I will be a fighter for Kansas and the Big First. As President Trump’s choice to chair the National Advisory Committee on Rural Health and Human Services, Governor Colyer recognizes that I will be a tireless crusader for free-market solutions to improving rural health care.
---
|
---
| **First TV Commercial Now On the Air** Our campaign’s first TV commercial is now on airwaves across the First District. The commercial serves as my introduction to Kansans who may not have met me yet. It says who I am and what I stand for in a very brief 30 seconds. We would encourage you to share it with your friends and neighbors who may not have seen it yet.
---
| [Watch Our Ad](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=5af9b4d8fb&e=a9d1410029 "Watch Our Ad")
---
|
---
| **Yard Signs** Television and radio commercials help political campaigns get their message out but the old-fashioned yard sign is still an integral part of modern-day campaigning. As potential voters drive down the street or walk through their neighborhood, they see the same sign promoting a candidate day after day. That kind of repetition can be accomplished for a fraction of the cost of a TV commercial. We recently received a limited number of larger 4x8 signs that are ideal for high traffic areas.
---
| [Request Your Yard Sign](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=8ab61d17d7&e=a9d1410029 "Request Your Yard Sign")
---
|
---
Quincy and Austin are great helpers!
|
---
| **We Hope to See You Soon! **
Thank you to everyone who has been so welcoming as we campaign across the First District. Kansans are thought of being kind and friendly and you prove that reputation to be true every day. Our travels have recently taken us to Emporia, Haskell, and Emporia. If we haven't been to your community yet, we hope to visit you soon!
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
| **Upcoming Election Dates** Our campaign needs you to vote in the August 4 primary election. I appreciate everyone’s support but it doesn’t really count if you don’t vote. Please keep the following dates before the primary election in mind: **July 14:** Deadline to register to vote or, if necessary, change address and re-register
**July 15:** Advance voting begins by mail and in-person
**July 28:** Deadline to apply for an advance mail ballot
---
|
---
| We look forward to continuing our campaign with visits across the Big First and hope to see you soon. Keep up-to-date with our campaign by following us on Facebook and Twitter or by visiting our website at www.traceymann.com. Thank you for your support. Together we will send a loud message to Washington on August 4 that the First District supports conservative Kansas values.
All my best,

Tracey
---
| [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/traceymann/rep-waymaster-drops-out-6916340?e=a9d1410029)
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=20d2449c15&e=a9d1410029)
---

Mann for Congress, Inc.

Salina, KS 67402-1084

Please keep the following dates before the primary election in mind: July 14: Deadline to register to vote or, if necessary, change address and re-register July 15: Advance voting begins by mail and in-person July 28: Deadline to apply for an advance mail ballot | | We look forward to continuing our campaign with visits across the Big First and hope to see you soon. Keep up-to-date with our campaign by following us on Facebook and Twitter or by visiting our website at www.traceymann.com. Thank you for your support. Together we will send a loud message to Washington on August 4 that the First District supports conservative Kansas values. All my best, Tracey | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | "Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc." | Copyright © 2020 Mann for Congress, Inc., All rights reserved.

name: Susan Collins
subject: Help me get ahead of this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Two years ago, the Far Left created a massive fund in an attempt to buy my vote for 4 million dollars during the confirmation of Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh. As always, I stood my ground and did what was right. I said it then and I will say it again: I cannot be bribed.

Peter,
Two years ago, the Far Left created a massive fund in an attempt to buy my vote for 4 million dollars during the confirmation of Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh. As always, I stood my ground and did what was right. I said it then and I will say it again: _I cannot be bribed._
**Next week, that same fund is going directly into the hands of my opponent. The fund is now over $4 MILLION.**
Right now, my opponent continues to outraise my campaign. She has the support of Chuck Schumer and Far Left dark money interest groups from across the country. And once she is given this enormous pot of money,**almost every dollar** will go toward spreading false attacks about my record across Maine. We must do everything we can to be prepared for this.
_**[Can you chip in any amount to my campaign before this MASSIVE fund hits my opponent's bank account? We must be prepared!](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI4ODUxODQS1&kn=20&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMDQ0MTUyMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**_

body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g74bGfBEe_6OuRU&b=MsBAxi1LF4jmr428DQRX1g

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I need your help to be YOUR champion in Congress!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g74bGfBEe_6OuRU&b=MsBAxi1LF4jmr428DQRX1g

The reason the extreme Left is attacking everyone and rioting is because they know they can't win elections. Look at the sort of policies they like!

-Tearing down historical statues

-Abolishing the police

-Abolishing the Constitution

-Attacking with violence anyone who disagrees with them

-Abolishing churches and Christianity

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g74bGfBEe_6OuRU&b=MsBAxi1LF4jmr428DQRX1g

These people don't want to do away with just Confederate statues. THEY WANT TO DO AWAY WITH AMERICA!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g74bGfBEe_6OuRU&b=MsBAxi1LF4jmr428DQRX1g

Part of their plan to do away with America is to get rid of the rule of law. Our country was founded on "Equal Justice Under Law".

But what the radical Left- this "new" Democrat party- wants is NOT freedom, NOR liberty.

What they want is chaos, destruction, and murder. But I don't!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g74bGfBEe_6OuRU&b=MsBAxi1LF4jmr428DQRX1g

They with to take away your freedom and replace it with a Communist dictatorship.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g74bGfBEe_6OuRU&b=MsBAxi1LF4jmr428DQRX1g

I am not a career politician or a slick fundraiser. I'm a career soldier who wants to defend our country against all enemies- foreign and domestic.

That's why I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g74bGfBEe_6OuRU&b=MsBAxi1LF4jmr428DQRX1g

Darren Soto will have all of Nancy Pelosi's Swamp money. That's why I need your help today- to replace Darren Soto, and support the President!

Will you join this fight with me? I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g74bGfBEe_6OuRU&b=MsBAxi1LF4jmr428DQRX1g

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g74bGfBEe_6OuRU&b=MsBAxi1LF4jmr428DQRX1g
I have a big fundraising deadline TODAY- and I'm still about $9,000

short of my goal. I need you to help me reach my goal!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g74bGfBEe_6OuRU&b=MsBAxi1LF4jmr428DQRX1g
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? I appreciate whatever you can send so we can defeat socialist Darren Soto!

The radical Democrats are going to lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g74bGfBEe_6OuRU&b=MsBAxi1LF4jmr428DQRX1g

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g74bGfBEe_6OuRU&b=MsBAxi1LF4jmr428DQRX1g

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g74bGfBEe_6OuRU&b=MsBAxi1LF4jmr428DQRX1g
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g74bGfBEe_6OuRU&b=MsBAxi1LF4jmr428DQRX1g
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.**

I'm a fighter, and I will fight against Nancy Pelosi and for America, every chance I get.
I was behind President Trump from the start because I knew we needed a fighter! And seeing the Democrats go off the deep edge into radical Socialism, we need fighters now more than ever.
[Can you join me in this fight](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j8iM_NUhXpNxmng&b=hPHIzzOU_tWJDf2eCdw70Q)? I need to raise the money to take out Nancy Pelosi's deputy.

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j8iM_NUhXpNxmng&b=hPHIzzOU_tWJDf2eCdw70Q)
---

**_I cannot stand the thought of looking at Nancy Pelosi in the Speaker's chair for another Congress. Help me do better!_**

[With so little time left before the deadline, I'm relying on you. Can you be the one who puts me over the top?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j8iM_NUhXpNxmng&b=hPHIzzOU_tWJDf2eCdw70Q)

**_I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi and her "kneeling radicals"! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!_**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j8iM_NUhXpNxmng&b=hPHIzzOU_tWJDf2eCdw70Q), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you.

G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy leftist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j8iM_NUhXpNxmng&b=hPHIzzOU_tWJDf2eCdw70Q). I appreciate you and thank you. Let's do this!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j8iM_NUhXpNxmng&b=hPHIzzOU_tWJDf2eCdw70Q)

Sandy Smith

Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: ‘Trump Punches Back At Totalitarian Left’ at Mt. Rushmore
body:
Here's why President Trump's Mt. Rushmore speech is so important. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=19b89e037e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# ‘Trump Punches Back At Totalitarian Left’ at Mt. Rushmore

“Which is more divisive? Tearing down our nation’s heroes and monuments, demeaning the accomplishments of a great country, casting patriotic Americans as relics from a bygone era, painting the United States as profoundly racist ... or railing against these things, as President Trump did at Mount Rushmore?,” Liz Peek writes for Fox News.

_The New York Times_ calls that defense of America a “divisive culture war” message.

“We ask the Times, who declared that war?”

[Click here to read more](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e7c828620a&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “On the same weekend in which famed abolitionist Frederick Douglass 168 years ago delivered one of his most historically resonant speeches, a statue of Douglass was toppled,” Gary Craig and Ryan Miller write in the [_Rochester Democrat and Chronicle_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7aa15e57b2&e=3ee4985eea) _._
---
|
---
| “After making the decision to disband its plainclothes ‘anti-crime’ unit, New York City has seen a 205% increase in shootings in comparison to the same time period last year,” Haley Victory Smith reports. “‘I feel like we are giving the streets back to the criminals,’ said the mother of one shooting victim.” Read more in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2380cb8a30&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Contrary to claims from both Chinese officials and the World Health Organization, China did not report the existence of the coronavirus in late 2019 . . . Rather, international health officials discovered the virus through information posted to a U.S. website,” Adam Kredo writes in the [_Washington Free Beacon_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b630660b01&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=58528ab717&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d8e3135d58&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=8bf7b9c7ed)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: SIGN NOW: Protect the ACA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
In the middle of this global health crisis, Republicans have decided to move forward with their partisan lawsuit to dismantle the ACA.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18154504/218932942/469631516?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNlNjJiYy1jYWJmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9F-EHWb-V8GOu_k5taWJY7mO5Hq5RMBQyQPULJnB5M=&emci=4689ac81-b6bf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=fece62bc-cabf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10203249) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._
Team,

In the face of unprecedented challenges and economic uncertainty from the COVID-19 pandemic, the last thing anyone should have to worry about is how they’re going to afford health care coverage.

**And yet, in the middle of this global health crisis, Republicans have decided to move forward with their partisan lawsuit to dismantle the ACA. This move would kick 23.3 million Americans off their health insurance, including 996,000 Pennsylvanians,_42,000 of whom live right here in PA-10_. **

[**This can’t stand, team. Join us in calling on our elected officials to drop this partisan lawsuit and protect the ACA by signing our petition now >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18154505/218932943/469631516?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNlNjJiYy1jYWJmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9F-EHWb-V8GOu_k5taWJY7mO5Hq5RMBQyQPULJnB5M=&emci=4689ac81-b6bf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=fece62bc-cabf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10203249) | [Drop the lawsuit](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18154506/218932944/469631516?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNlNjJiYy1jYWJmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9F-EHWb-V8GOu_k5taWJY7mO5Hq5RMBQyQPULJnB5M=&emci=4689ac81-b6bf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=fece62bc-cabf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10203249)
---

Scott Perry has voted time and time again to strip health care away from _millions of Americans_ and destroy protections for those with pre-existing conditions. He is more worried about winning ideological fights in Washington than doing right by his constituents. Now more than ever, it’s imperative that our elected officials are fighting to expand access to affordable health care -- not take it away.

[**Add your name if you believe that it’s time to drop this partisan lawsuit and protect the ACA now >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18154507/218932945/469631516?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNlNjJiYy1jYWJmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9F-EHWb-V8GOu_k5taWJY7mO5Hq5RMBQyQPULJnB5M=&emci=4689ac81-b6bf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=fece62bc-cabf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10203249) [Add my name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18154508/218932946/469631516?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNlNjJiYy1jYWJmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9F-EHWb-V8GOu_k5taWJY7mO5Hq5RMBQyQPULJnB5M=&emci=4689ac81-b6bf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=fece62bc-cabf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10203249)

\--Team Eugene

name: Tina Smith
subject: Bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
I just got out of my weekly check-in with our team and I have two pieces of bad news to share with you:
1. Donald Trump’s campaign is starting to air ads on TV again in Minnesota — which means our state is a top target on his list.

2. We are only a handful of days into July, and not on pace to reach our very first goal of this month.

I'm a little worried because if we fall short this early in the month, then I'm afraid Republican mega-donors and right-wing groups will think Minnesota is ripe for the taking. That's why it's so important we hit these goals every single week through Election Day — especially now that we’re four months out. To compete with the kind of GOP cash we’re sure to see at any moment, we need a surge of grassroots contributions from folks like you. So, I'm asking: **Can I count on you to donate toward our weekly goal of raising $20,000 before midnight on Friday and helping us stay on track for July? clean_body: | I just got out of my weekly check-in with our team and I have two pieces of bad news to share with you: 1. Donald Trump’s campaign is starting to air ads on TV again in Minnesota — which means our state is a top target on his list. 2. We are only a handful of days into July, and not on pace to reach our very first goal of this month. I'm a little worried because if we fall short this early in the month, then I'm afraid Republican mega-donors and right-wing groups will think Minnesota is ripe for the taking. That's why it's so important we hit these goals every single week through Election Day — especially now that we’re four months out. To compete with the kind of GOP cash we’re sure to see at any moment, we need a surge of grassroots contributions from folks like you. So, I'm asking: Can I count on you to donate toward our weekly goal of raising $20,000 before midnight on Friday and helping us stay on track for July? I wouldn't ask if it wasn't so important. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = In order to take on Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and our GOP opponent, we need to build an organization that can withstand the onslaught of attacks heading our way. That's why your contribution matters so much today. Thanks for everything. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota To receive exclusive campaign updates, text TINA to 30311 and subscribe to our texts! [](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7f68/4bd7760e/5f143461/77a9be28/2792744317/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/thank-nancy-pelosi/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_200706_3MC-3MO_none_STD_2_Pelosi&source=314_EM_SV_200706_3MC-3MO_none_STD_2_Pelosi&refcode=314_EM_SV_200706_3MC-3MO_none_STD_2_Pelosi")

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Stop paying Americans more to stay home than to work!
body:
| |
---
This week, we have to stop the Democrats from keeping Americans home instead of helping them get back to work, and we need to share President Trump’s Independence Day speech to fight the media’s lies about it. Lastly, keep sharing The Second Opinion Project and the interviews from doctors.
|
---
**No on Supplemental Unemployment Payments**
**& Yes on a Payroll Tax Suspension**
Nancy Pelosi wants her $3 trillion spending spree to happen, including a six-month extension of the $600-a-week supplemental unemployment payment, which are scheduled to end July 31.

President Trump, on the other hand, supports a payroll tax suspension. They will begin negotiations soon, and we must stand firm against extending the supplemental unemployment payments. While we understand there are so many families that have been plunged into joblessness, anxiety, and uncertainty because of the lockdowns, but we also know that he best thing for all Americans, including the unemployed, is to get back to work as quickly as possible.

Nancy Pelosi’s proposal of extending the supplemental payments will pay people more to sit at home than go back to work. The payroll tax suspension will do the opposite. It will be easier for employers to bring their employees back, and employees will basically get a raise when they come back. Additionally, in homes where one person is employed and one is not, getting that payroll tax suspension (raise) will help everyone.

We know that the Democrats want to keep the country’s economy on life support because they care more about winning elections than they do about the future of the nation, or about individual families that need to get back to work. This is one way they can achieve that goal.

[This _Wall Street Journal_ article](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTg4LTZjOTQ4MjBmMGQyYzRhZDg5YmNjMGE1ZDEwYmViYzA5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud3NqLmNvbS9hcnRpY2xlcy9hLXRydWUtZWNvbm9taWMtc3RpbXVsdXMtcGxhbi0xMTU5MzcyODM3Mj9taWQ9NDIzMTcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=ZJMf3FJ2nbWtGGXPvyARCA) (which is behind a paywall) by Steve Moore and Casey Mulligan discuss these two options in detail. Here is their summary:
_The difference between Mr. Trump’s and Mrs. Pelosi’s approaches is a swing of almost 13 million jobs—more than the entire workforces of Indiana, Michigan and Ohio combined. If the goal of a Phase 4 stimulus plan is to encourage economic growth and put Americans back to work, the wise choice is the payroll tax cut. It isn’t even a close call._
“It isn’t even a close call.”

So, let’s get to work this week to oppose Pelosi’s scheme to pay people to stay home from work, and support the President’s plan to get Americans back to work and give them a raise. See the action items below to make it happen.

**Call & email your Representative and both of your Senators**
It doesn’t matter if your Rep. or your Senators are Republicans or Democrats. The same message goes to all of them.
* **Tell them to vote NO on any effort to extend the supplemental unemployment payments beyond July 31.**
* **Tell them to vote YES on a payroll tax suspension for the rest of the year** , so that Americans can get back to work and get a raise!
* **Send the Wall Street Journal article to your Representative and your Senators.** They all most likely have a subscription and can read the full article. You will probably have to go to their official government websites and use their online contact forms rather than actual email. Here is the link: [https://www.wsj.com/articles/a-true-economic-stimulus-plan-11593728372](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTg4LTZjOTQ4MjBmMGQyYzRhZDg5YmNjMGE1ZDEwYmViYzA5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud3NqLmNvbS9hcnRpY2xlcy9hLXRydWUtZWNvbm9taWMtc3RpbXVsdXMtcGxhbi0xMTU5MzcyODM3Mj9taWQ9NDIzMTcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=w2ao2FeGHldpL--Zs757Lg)

|
---
**Share President Trump’s Independence Day Speech**
Like the good little Democrat party foot soldiers they are, the mainstream media went insane after President Trump’s 4th of July speech. One of the most uplifting, beautiful, patriotic speeches sent them howling with rage, so they did what they usually do, and they lied about it being “dark” and “divisive.”

We need to ensure that Americans watch it or read it for themselves, rather than believing the headlines. Share his speech over social media, email it, text it, etc. Send it and share it in as many ways as you can! Just copy and paste the links to share them.

[https://youtu.be/NlESdf5yMpY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTg4LTZjOTQ4MjBmMGQyYzRhZDg5YmNjMGE1ZDEwYmViYzA5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1ObEVTZGY1eU1wWSZtaWQ9NDIzMTcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=yXHk6bpiGm6dzTs58O0GuQ)
* **Transcript of President Trump's Remarks on Independence Day**
[https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/remarks-president-trump-2020-salute-america](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTg4LTZjOTQ4MjBmMGQyYzRhZDg5YmNjMGE1ZDEwYmViYzA5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2hpdGVob3VzZS5nb3YvYnJpZWZpbmdzLXN0YXRlbWVudHMvcmVtYXJrcy1wcmVzaWRlbnQtdHJ1bXAtMjAyMC1zYWx1dGUtYW1lcmljYT9taWQ9NDIzMTcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Z48K7VjQjeAF_GzRHkc1aA)
* **Full Video from Independence Day at the White House**
[https://youtu.be/Zkw8-bNUTy4](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTg4LTZjOTQ4MjBmMGQyYzRhZDg5YmNjMGE1ZDEwYmViYzA5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1aa3c4LWJOVVR5NCZtaWQ9NDIzMTcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=nEEdoqEW6I-8mq_a5BxcvA)
* **Highlights Video from Mount Rushmore on July 3rd**
[https://youtu.be/z_LkIA_Oeus](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTg4LTZjOTQ4MjBmMGQyYzRhZDg5YmNjMGE1ZDEwYmViYzA5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj16X0xrSUFfT2V1cyZtaWQ9NDIzMTcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=ImhXOm6Mr3vjsR19B5bwOQ)
* **Transcript of President Trump’s Remarks from Mount Rushmore**
[https://theconservativetreehouse.com/2020/07/04/transcript-of-president-trump-speech-during-mount-rushmore-july-4th-celebration](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTg4LTZjOTQ4MjBmMGQyYzRhZDg5YmNjMGE1ZDEwYmViYzA5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVjb25zZXJ2YXRpdmV0cmVlaG91c2UuY29tLzIwMjAvMDcvMDQvdHJhbnNjcmlwdC1vZi1wcmVzaWRlbnQtdHJ1bXAtc3BlZWNoLWR1cmluZy1tb3VudC1ydXNobW9yZS1qdWx5LTR0aC1jZWxlYnJhdGlvbi8_bWlkPTQyMzE3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=xA1HevSM6COFlIzlGo8iZg)

Please keep sharing the website, the videos, petitions, and letters, which can all be found at: [https://www.secondopinionproject.com](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTg4LTZjOTQ4MjBmMGQyYzRhZDg5YmNjMGE1ZDEwYmViYzA5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2Vjb25kb3BpbmlvbnByb2plY3QuY29tP21pZD00MjMxNyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=KJKsmh1Rt5wQHjqJKG4VGg)

_**Note about sharing links:** We’ve heard from some of you that you are not on any social media and so you can’t share videos and petitions and other items. I just wanted to assure you that if you share links over email to your friends and family, it is just as effective and important as sharing on social media. We are going to make it easier for those of you who are only sharing over email to copy and paste the link into an email. Sometimes we will specifically need a social media post to be shared, and for those action items, if you do not do social media, you can simply copy and paste the link for those posts into an email. At the end of the day, we are just so thankful for whatever actions you are able to take. Thank you!_
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin

subject: we’re on the road to set records again

body:
Hoosiers are resilient. They are strong. And they NEVER back down from a challenge. | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=1d4d7b7e92014bf281a26dc390f9e59a&_e=BHV40uZH66m8SclbQuLWPttNSBaOsY3jTJ-Hp4yEBt-eG0_Cus4OuIcpcLO2wNsTcRi9L_nXhEgxH--zlLu4GAZPeKoWySslcIqOllRZUhLKRgkdXv81YstnA6VUN-0velVGE5snK5h_jN5eSB1onCsUJ-e9UGW7F92jOxbWlCPxADr9-SQZ4pohQclj5qd9x2Y3uE9vtYVlJ7lxIxsWN2JGDoczlX6r5hGyThig32DrcDk4JKU4O-bV2PwwFvSYcHmCfgh2FvbbPpCpkA_-cx2R7x6mDLcXGfna-n99IZ6YwpoRug1G_b9ZPhfLkyRIvo0JpZ_0FZYTplasai96TXrhjmnPI-SbE25TBneC24lfOuV_OVcgZ8dG-7kBPqFxcWKYzPYO3Esbl4bsjrIIYKbgO1kB5K7MzMzqWBDeZlVRTL7jkNCthh6ly0dIMu2t56ZuXJLPS5SkR4XFyOnViF1MccjFbSoB7GgFPO9tmUs%3D) |
---|---|---
Friend,

The last couple of months have been tough.

**But Hoosiers are resilient. They are strong. And they NEVER back down from a challenge. **

Before COVID-19, Indiana was setting records.

_We were creating jobs at an unprecedented pace, raising Hoosier wages higher than ever before, and investing in our infrastructure -- and more importantly, our people. And we did this all while balancing our budget, keeping taxes low, and building one of the best environments for job creators in all of America._
[**Join Indiana’s Economic Comeback**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=1d4d7b7e92014bf281a26dc390f9e59a&_e=BHV40uZH66m8SclbQuLWPttNSBaOsY3jTJ-Hp4yEBt-eG0_Cus4OuIcpcLO2wNsTcRi9L_nXhEgxH--zlLu4GAZPeKoWySslcIqOllRZUhLKRgkdXv81YstnA6VUN-0velVGE5snK5h_jN5eSB1onCsUJ-e9UGW7F92jOxbWlCPxADr9-SQZ4pohQclj5qd9x2Y3uE9vtYVlJ7lxIxsWN2JGDoczlX6r5hGyThig32DrcDk4JKU4O-bV2PwwFvSYcHmCfgh2FvbbPpCpkA_-c6gYw5SeRlkAPUoR-6JVN28lFkQIeR28IJ22bQUX6L5KIMA9ougtVrkwW3MsV2bh7BlYkSlRdKVCwiPfIBOuhoQ9t0OkELGEkBN7b54iaBDV5XZpFBW_1zGiu73A3G580G6M7Vu4nbJYBRo9U3H0axxaGJ5SuMWtWQVSqWi_qlwzK4xYvEO_GPtEC4ar2NXpc1ffqXeQQ6r6Hj_6rjqwL9o%3D)
When COVID-19 hit Indiana, we had to slow down — nothing is more important than the safety of our families, friends, and neighbors.

The fight against COVID-19 isn’t over, but we can see the light at the end of the tunnel in Indiana. Friend, we’re poised to start setting records again.

**As Eric put it last month, the best is yet to come for Indiana. **

And we need the support of Hoosiers from all walks of life and from every corner of Indiana.

Will you help lead our economic comeback? If so, add your name using the button below.
[**Join Indiana’s Economic Comeback**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=1d4d7b7e92014bf281a26dc390f9e59a&_e=BHV40uZH66m8SclbQuLWPttNSBaOsY3jTJ-Hp4yEBt-eG0_Cus4OuIcpcLO2wNsTcRi9L_nXhEgxH--zlLu4GAZPeKoWySslcIqOllRZUhLKRgkdXv81YstnA6VUN-0velVGE5snK5h_jN5eSB1onCsUJ-e9UGW7F92jOxbWlCPxADr9-SQZ4pohQclj5qd9x2Y3uE9vtYVlJ7lxIxsWN2JGDoczlX6r5hGyThig32DrcDk4JKU4O-bV2PwwFvSYcHmCfgh2FvbbPpCpkA_-c_aXTI7vIF2vUtfFtWmiS6mV7rPPu4-nYWDFJ5g-q5gTiArTzEkkQReAGdCdZjhybTN0odADyA8BEkiS4MeSWhq58uRSEk_8APLVMayrt8Ru74gbBrkeODcRQ1REfeOnYlxs_DiUsNSN6jackdFIFfbzKhjUA1brJgnptNVaNY60C2dDomftnpfXuXP636iIZ0axwIZ_FUfaOyFEMOA5m_U%3D)
Thank you for your support,

Your Holcomb Crew

name: Biden for President
subject: so close to our 50,000 signature goal!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We set a goal to collect 50,000 signatures from Team Joe supporters like you to protect the Affordable Care Act. |
---
Peter \--

Last month, we emailed you with jarring news that even in the midst of a global pandemic, Donald Trump's administration moved to try and end the Affordable Care Act.

How cruel is it for the Trump Administration to proactively work to strip Americans of their health care in a time when so many need affordable coverage the most?

We're not going to let Trump's disgusting political stunt go unanswered -- **that 's why we set a goal to collect 50,000 signatures from Team Joe supporters like you to protect the Affordable Care Act.**

[Peter, we're so close to reaching this goal, but it doesn't look like you've signed this important petition yet. Can you add your name next to ours and be the one who helps us cross 50,000 signatures to protect the Affordable Care Act?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bedc/1cd0ac28/87fa3353/357cdd31/1963932111/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/add-your-name-defend-aca?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.06_B1_acapet_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.06_B1_acapet_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2") | **SIGN ON TO PROTECT THE AFFORDABLE CARE ACT!**
---
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bedc/1cd0ac28/87fa3353/357cdd31/1963932111/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/add-your-name-defend-aca?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.06_B1_acapet_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.06_B1_acapet_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2")
**Name:** Peter Willis
**Signed the Petition?** No, not yet!
| [SIGN ON NOW »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bedc/1cd0ac28/87fa3353/357cdd31/1963932111/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/add-your-name-defend-aca?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.06_B1_acapet_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.06_B1_acapet_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2")
---
As president, Joe Biden will always speak up and act quickly to protect affordable health care -- but, until he's sworn in as our 46th president, we must make our voices heard loud and clear.

That's why we're calling on you to add your name to our petition to protect the ACA and stop Trump's reckless behavior:

[https://go.joebiden.com/add-your-name-defend-aca](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bedc/1cd0ac28/87fa3353/357cdd31/1963932111/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/add-your-name-defend-aca?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.06_B1_acapet_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.06_B1_acapet_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2")

Thank you,

Biden for President
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bedc/1cd0ac28/87fa3353/357cdd2e/1963932111/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bedc/1cd0ac28/87fa3353/357cdd2b/1963932111/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bedc/1cd0ac28/87fa3353/357cdd29/1963932111/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bedc/1cd0ac28/87fa3353/357cdd26/1963932111/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bedc/1cd0ac28/87fa3353/357cdd25/1963932111/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bedc/1cd0ac28/87fa3353/357cdd23/1963932111/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bedc/1cd0ac28/87fa3353/357cdd21/1963932111/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bedc/1cd0ac28/87fa3353/357cdd1f/1963932111/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bedc/1cd0ac28/87fa3353/357cdd1d/1963932111/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bedc/1cd0ac28/87fa3353/357cdd1b/1963932111/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bedc/1cd0ac28/87fa3353/357cdd21/1963932111/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bedc/1cd0ac28/87fa3353/357cdd1a/1963932111/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bedc/1cd0ac28/87fa3353/357cdd1f/1963932111/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bedc/1cd0ac28/87fa3353/357cdd19/1963932111/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

| | Team — we’re witnessing the worst economic and public health crisis in generations.

The number of workers who have permanently lost their jobs is rising. And data released today from the New York Times shows Black and Latino Americans are three times as likely to be infected by COVID-19 as their white neighbors.

[This is unacceptable.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18156110/218986845/-1236260092?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWY4NGY2OC1lM2JmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gb7uaTsddxfC2qyRy5izmm0vIjRBJLIM7HLVKejnOug=&emci=66b786b6-ddbf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=0af84f68-e3bf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=1295540)

[But Republicans in Washington are trying to block these proposals. We can’t let that happen.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18156111/218986846/-1236260092?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWY4NGY2OC1lM2JmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gb7uaTsddxfC2qyRy5izmm0vIjRBJLIM7HLVKejnOug=&emci=66b786b6-ddbf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=0af84f68-e3bf-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=1295540)

body:
My campaign team has received word that Donna Shalala is begging her supporters for their help because her campaign is in a nosedive. [ ](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=6f44b1c370b04181a26df42da4e8346a&_e=UDnySrjssaDKvJYKBni8QqT1hv3pk8kSfqp_6vkxbniIt4ljeHF1J5-Rj2yOXhA1VtHWoliXzI4V9wwaoBxz_oVCJOKj9i8XRRD3NSpU1sWG5I-7-JUe0dcFf4VwCuQ58eUjikcVlkTFMdFAjVTPf-11uSBzDZlToOhz7y7Ch1APUe_CLaG7ZSfErbC4ziXoedM38rtriVN74SrAUyeF3DKJhv-N2ww5837U350Bk_u3CfgNcsW1Sazd0Zyv_QJ9o_q3Yxg3Zza-qfj7kTyi4hD785g136bdWvO8PZRWuHWP0x3Tb_EDT0yuB4EtlhLpgtF1ZZYb2veU5niIiIo1GJYSojGfKbdprk5jDax-B6RCIjghohVJj08TKCjQr3b89_VFuoFl_D6u23A-cGMzqBeM5KUkDJ_8l64HEPrKvC4%3D) Peter, My campaign team has received word that Donna Shalala is begging her supporters for their help because her campaign is in a nosedive. Shady Shalala knows that her campaign is “on the ropes”, but we can’t stop until the battle is won in November. Take a look at her plea to campaign supporters last week: “As you may know, Maria Elvira Salazar is running against me again, and the Republican machine has helped her out raise me twice this cycle. She now has a concerning $800,000 cash on hand. We are soon going to find ourselves in a fundraising deficit...” -Donna Shalala [**Keep D.C. Our strong fundraising sends a clear signal that we are ready for a fight in November, but it’s not because of the national Republican party. _**It’s because of amazing grassroots supporters like you and the public fundraising reports show it. **_
Despite being the ultimate D.C. political insider and being backed by liberals like Nancy Pelosi and Hillary Clinton, Donna Shalala is still losing this fight!!
**That’s because you can’t fool the people of Miami! **
Unlike Donna Shalala, my grassroots campaign is built on protecting the American Dream and faithfully representing the people of South Florida, not fighting for D.C. special interests and enriching my own stock portfolio. clean_body: My campaign team has received word that Donna Shalala is begging her supporters for their help because her campaign is in a nosedive. Peter, My campaign team has received word that Donna Shalala is begging her supporters for their help because her campaign is in a nosedive. Shady Shalala knows that her campaign is “on the ropes”, but we can’t stop until the battle is won in November. Take a look at her plea to campaign supporters last week: “As you may know, Maria Elvira Salazar is running against me again, and the Republican machine has helped her out raise me twice this cycle. She now has a concerning $800,000 cash on hand. We are soon going to find ourselves in a fundraising deficit...” -Donna Shalala Shady Shalala is right about one thing. Our strong fundraising sends a clear signal that we are ready for a fight in November, but it’s not because of the national Republican party. It’s because of amazing grassroots supporters like you and the public fundraising reports show it. Despite being the ultimate D.C. political insider and being backed by liberals like Nancy Pelosi and Hillary Clinton, Donna Shalala is still losing this fight!! That’s because you can’t fool the people of Miami! Unlike Donna Shalala, my grassroots campaign is built on protecting the American Dream and faithfully representing the people of South Florida, not fighting for D.C. special interests and enriching my own stock portfolio. Miami deserves a member of Congress who will fight for them - not the Democrat Machine and Washington money. Peter, we have Shady Shalala on the ropes, but we have to keep that momentum going. We can’t let Donna Shalala and the Democrat Machine turn our free Miami into another socialist nightmare. I willFIGHT for the people of Florida all day, every day, but I can’t do it alone. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar We know that Americans all across the country are going through a challenging time and many are struggling to make ends meet as a result of the coronavirus outbreak. subject: Your weekly #TeamDani update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b3a56f8842c3/your-weekly-teamdani-update?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hello, Dani Family! I hope you all hate a great holiday weekend full of watermelon and potato salad! Make sure you’re getting ready for the **Zoom chat with Dani on Tuesday, July 14th at 6 pm!** Save the date and be there! We’ll send out the zoom link closer to the day. Take a look at what you accomplished this past week:
* **We’re a third of the way there!!** We are trying to fill Soldier Field with voters we called by the end of the summer! You were able to connect with **3,731** people in the 16th district on the phone this week.

Let’s keep it up!
* **MVP of the week award goes to Dave K.** who made more than 300 of those calls!
* Some things to look forward to:
* ## Tomorrow!
* **July 7th: A Facebook Live Town Hall! Register here: **
* [https://www.daniforillinois.com/events/facebook-live-town-hall](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=e6bc8379b8&e=140a9b81e7)
* Submit your questions here: [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/14x1WRHtLu7JSpp5st1icS9XGPkbHqXVRswUy7TAnVb4/viewform?edit_requested=true](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=e172082af1&e=140a9b81e7)

A few reminders:
* **IT'S SUMMER & IT'S TIME TO PARTY!: **If you are interested in hosting a Virtual House Party for Dani, reach out to Marguerite at [marguerite@daniforillinois.com](mailto:marguerite@daniforillinois.com). We will walk you through it, and all you need to do is sit back with your happy hour drink of choice and invite your friends to do the same!
* While you’re still on the phone finishing phone banking, **CALL YOUR FRIENDS!** Everyone in your social circles has the potential to be an activist and volunteer right alongside you - you never know unless you ask!
* If you have new tips to share as part of our Volunteer Voice column, send them my way!

**Volunteer Voice! ** The guest columnist this week is... Megan S. _I ALWAYS identify myself by saying, "Hi this is Megan, I am a VOLUNTEER, for Dani B----.” I want the caller to know that I am taking time out of my day to do this important work and that I am NOT a paid employee for the campaign, or some call center employee, that is hired to make calls and don't care. I care deeply about the message, the outcome, and the candidate._
Kathy Tall
Deputy Field Director

Friend,

You’ve always been a top supporter of mine, and to thank you, I want to offer you a spot on my Trump Presidential Honor Roll.

Members of my Honor Roll have shown true dedication to our America First agenda, and have made it clear they will continue fighting to Keep America Great no matter what LIES the Left throws our way.

Joining my Honor Roll is absolutely paramount, and that’s why I’m calling on YOU to step up and accept my offer so that we can FIGHT BACK against their constant attacks.

I’m only extending this offer to my most loyal supporters. The Presidential Honor Roll is a select group and I can only guarantee your spot for the next 3 hours. I hope you can accept your invitation to this distinguished group of Trump supporters.

name: James Mackler
subject: re: Mt. Rushmore:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
Bill Hagerty's tweet took it to the next level.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa135/18d6a294/4c9bd32b/26d7f3f4/4239213783/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | | [](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa135/18d6a294/4c9bd32b/26d7f3f5/4239213783/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MDYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200706?refcode=jme200706_m_other&refcode2=107423")
---
On Fourth of July, our opponent Bill Hagerty suggested elevating Donald Trump's likeness to join George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, Theodore Roosevelt and Abraham Lincoln on Mount Rushmore.
[_**CHIP IN TO FIGHT BACK ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa135/18d6a294/4c9bd32b/26d7f3f5/4239213783/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MDYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200706?refcode=jme200706_m_other&refcode2=107423")
A record making Tennessee the leader in rural hospital closures, ignoring the opioid epidemic, starting a trade war that hurt our state's economy more than any other -- and has failed to contain COVID-19 -- is not one to lionize.
[_**Yet Hagerty cheers every failure in a dangerous policy agenda that hurts Tennessee.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa135/18d6a294/4c9bd32b/26d7f3f5/4239213783/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MDYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200706?refcode=jme200706_m_other&refcode2=107423")
Hagerty is not running to serve Tennessee -- he's running to rubber-stamp whatever he's told to in the Senate and **_he 's willing to put Trump's face on Mount Rushmore to get there._**
[_**Tennessee can 't afford another rubber-stamp joining Marsha Blackburn in the Senate. One is bad enough. Help us fight back today ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa135/18d6a294/4c9bd32b/26d7f3f5/4239213783/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MDYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200706?refcode=jme200706_m_other&refcode2=107423")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | | [Donate $5](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa135/18d6a294/4c9bd32b/26d7f3f2/4239213783/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MDYiLCJlM3NnWVhOck1TQjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200706?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jme200706_m_&refcode2=107423")
---
| | [Donate $25](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa135/18d6a294/4c9bd32b/26d7f3f3/4239213783/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MDYiLCJlM3NnWVhOck1pQjlmUT09IjoiMjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200706?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jme200706_m_&refcode2=107423")
---
| | [Donate $50](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa135/18d6a294/4c9bd32b/26d7f3f0/4239213783/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MDYiLCJlM3NnWVhOck15QjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200706?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jme200706_m_&refcode2=107423")
---
| | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa135/18d6a294/4c9bd32b/26d7f3f5/4239213783/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MDYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200706?refcode=jme200706_m_other&refcode2=107423")
---
When I joined the U.S. Army -- and many times since -- I swore an oath to protect and defend the Constitution. It's not any one senator's job to rubber stamp any president or party leader's agenda. Senators swear an oath to the Constitution, and their mission is to serve all their constituents. That's the type of senator I will be. That's not Bill Hagerty.
[_**I 'm in this fight for Tennesseans -- not Washington politicians or their agendas. If you are able, chip in today.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa135/18d6a294/4c9bd32b/26d7f3f5/4239213783/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MDYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200706?refcode=jme200706_m_other&refcode2=107423")
In service,
James

|

body:
The radical liberal mob has continued to violently tear down statues and vandalize monuments all across the country and they have taken things to a new level. It is clear the radical mob is just looking to cause chaos and destruction. They’re not protesters—they’re vandals looking to wreak havoc. The radical liberal mob has continued to violently tear down statues and vandalize monuments all across the country and they have taken things to a new level.

It is clear the radical mob is just looking to cause chaos and destruction. They’re not protesters—they’re vandals looking to wreak havoc.

I warned about the perils of cancel culture and we are now seeing it play out in real time.

The criminals are trying to rewrite history. They have defaced Washington, Lincoln, Jefferson, Grant, and now even Frederick Douglass memorials.

My response is simple: lock these criminals up.

Sign my petition: Support mandatory minimums for criminals who damage statues and monuments. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI4ODg0ODYS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMDQ1Nzg3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0

My new bill will do just that. It's time to remind the leftist mob that crime doesn't pay. My new bill will ensure that any vandal caught damaging or destroying a monument will get a prison sentence.

I have had enough.

If we give the liberal mob an inch, they’ll take a mile. We need to put a mandatory minimum for destroying memorials and statues.

If you agree, I need you to sign this petition to support my new bill to impose mandatory minimums for these criminals. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI4ODg0ODYS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMDQ1Nzg3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0

Giving in to the mob will make it worse. Instead of appeasement, the criminals who destroyed the statues should be arrested.

I hope you will stand with me and support my bill.

Tom Cotton
