name: Darin LaHood
subject: Could America survive Biden?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
I need to know where you stand on this as we get closer to November. Do you think America would survive four years of Joe Biden? [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=72b3757566694d31b59b833ad81715ea&_e=CjpkZy5OKYjJGFa-VMkGDWGbFFQpbxZsnv_Q0drxvyB_QbQXEB3_QgAL_j27KWHzMIN4i9eVd71rtG0YP09yfainwnAlaFcXI2vGf9itixzT8LjfYman8y6TE_y1Vy4aR521OA7GD7kyFiHU2BSTLptxK4b36ZcIMOZHq3DKRzaQZlEwmcwz__bL-z8Wz9nx9MlALBwHMHIT88yZgHWB93-_vlh-vJU7do77qSHuWIT18ulRm6SzC2PQMqLHULvcqces22-wSZ1SyZI5ZVpO1X6LF-LEKQ5Zt1_ASw94Wh_9KVShKn9CX0UhWfPmmCVg2lMuYRckr_KGHNcExPKoCHZBIS4HQe8bxQFhS2XIrka3cXwm51q-iuF2LcsSFbU_to3wT5BXQvzOJ8kG238Ttz4UVE0vk8oC0h_9lrPuYR2cm2-A8HigXPXmFPO9p0xQRHImkJrjeIniBUtibwhkMqGTYOEsCXnb2Ts-SYEn7Lw%3D) Friend, Once again, our nation is at a crossroads as we approach another presidential election, and like millions of other Americans, I find myself asking the same question right now –
**Could America as we know it survive four years of a Joe Biden presidency as progressives like AOC, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer push our Congress farther left every day?** [**Yes**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=72b3757566694d31b59b833ad81715ea&_e=CjpkZy5OKYjJGFa-VMkGDWGbFFQpbxZsnv_Q0drxvyB_QbQXEB3_QgAL_j27KWHzuf2N5TXsZEncMz6RcEhn7i_G31mXJORjAM-8jQQjqz1l9vQpq_M1BrOrWwTa26RLW_gx3GWAqQIgq_8FFLkvpJSOENQTpm_nij5NpwfAGO-0Dy1YhcP_9VxHX2x_YoUI67zVz5IaKDGHGaaVzqfOpF_CtUe9a0ce08EVs_CzIuAmauGHxM39Z2k4jIkWFPS-wzFiUqRkQ5il44JqbtEHktoTOUq3pdNrnaf9zRBZ2PRDifWZvM_Nml1pgvRddw0mNF6qKollQcgIr79qYAYNsbkUeSL642sIuB7I_wcYPAbbHmbmEGUnF-83rH2xgaPwbToKU4pR6r1b-5BlPKRm7w6LiUV4aKaG7xHqW152OJnrJDYiAltZxzqk7IdYJN5e9tWCv3qbiQ0GcuLcoS0Rx03TqDEbgzG6HEG3QteMMH2h2ilvf-MPlO9zN_kSGTbhALibGI8Vm3bKgRmldGr_QeHe32xVnvLoPqrHYIwMR19z1kDjVSPLJEI0BOz3LxqG) [**No**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=72b3757566694d31b59b833ad81715ea&_e=CjpkZy5OKYjJGFa-VMkGDWGbFFQpbxZsnv_Q0drxvyB_QbQXEB3_QgAL_j27KWHzuf2N5TXsZEncMz6RcEhn7i_G31mXJORjAM-8jQQjqz1l9vQpq_M1BrOrWwTa26RLW_gx3GWAqQIgq_8FFLkvpO7Ele-edZm3oXxb164edccu1lvksk0aUYl-5e79UCNvwB37s0YR6tELlmxCKYjgKncsYp4l8kncvpsdkeTyENomd52pNUsdH5zdLZh-k9NGfpF3wwpp_85C2-5v-x2qxLmXLUCKiHUh8YOK-_ypHLltRZ-3toY7hG9QnULGYNM0jBBxi_FYDkjOpD7nZbx1cFhEtC7VxXRGW6wgpoll9RFQRCdeOfW_2FoZHdA2I8hCtkrrQ9zO5EQWx0Qe7_qeBQvQ16f89bPfk4YTBfEgKDNmVJq7Lts6t2JfRp0ahhc1WYz1YLTT49owme9d6sSiApU_TiD-ILSs8GWBeQYWrQk9LBXkAyClu_gHXitKPFvTK7dAyn_tZc-2CMSKCwMZuDUSsdE10asqVoHy721Xsgnxk-gBdT5W5I6MA1OLZG8t) **I don’t think so. Here’s why:**
Our nation barely survived Biden’s leadership when he was Vice President. Illinois watched – along with every other state – as countless factories uprooted and moved overseas leaving workers unemployed and communities reeling under President Obama and Joe Biden’s watch.
Now with America’s recovering economy facing new hurdles and Democrats in Congress looking to damage our communities even further by tearing down their police departments, we can’t afford a single day of a Joe Biden presidency – much less four entire years!
**What do you think – could America survive four years of Biden’s misguided leadership?** [**Yes**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=72b3757566694d31b59b833ad81715ea&_e=CjpkZy5OKYjJGFa-VMkGDWGbFFQpbxZsnv_Q0drxvyB_QbQXEB3_QgAL_j27KWHzuf2N5TXsZEncMz6RcEhn7i_G31mXJORjAM-8jQQjqz1l9vQpq_M1BrOrWwTa26RLW_gx3GWAqQIgq_8FFLkvpJSOENQTpm_nij5NpwfAGO-0Dy1YhcP_9VxHX2x_YoUI67zVz5IaKDGHGaaVzqfOpF_CtUe9a0ce08EVs_CzIuAmauGHxM39Z2k4jIkWFPS-wzFiUqRkQ5il44JqbtEHktoTOUq3pdNrnaf9zRBZ2PRDifWZvM_Nml1pgvRddw0mNF6qKollQcgIr79qYAYNsbkUeSL642sIuB7I_wcYPAYbrmOFOnVUDJrGPGN7fzoLA3jGyKSZaI_t47BlrrZHOpxC5PN09v6PXHqgilAOj0atlkZ0msHZNMDBKjITD9lwbZfiTsCc2uHeMKIGKM6uwFHvymAT_fpizSoglw0VZEzQFjMBMQ1KeXhKgVAWUbe7kZXiFT7aFyArBtn12u6M11TF26J1lS7t7VXmfxfv58GoUTvBhlptB_K11nIolPFj) [**No**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=72b3757566694d31b59b833ad81715ea&_e=CjpkZy5OKYjJGFa-VMkGDWGbFFQpbxZsnv_Q0drxvyB_QbQXEB3_QgAL_j27KWHzuf2N5TXsZEncMz6RcEhn7i_G31mXJORjAM-8jQQjqz1l9vQpq_M1BrOrWwTa26RLW_gx3GWAqQIgq_8FFLkvpO7Ele-edZm3oXxb164edccu1lvksk0aUYl-5e79UCNvwB37s0YR6tELlmxCKYjgKncsYp4l8kncvpsdkeTyENomd52pNUsdH5zdLZh-k9NGfpF3wwpp_85C2-5v-x2qxLmXLUCKiHUh8YOK-_ypHLltRZ-3toY7hG9QnULGYNM0jBBxi_FYDkjOpD7nZbx1cFhEtC7VxXRGW6wgpoll9RENYht3nYEswFVLG-Z1QVa7xia16sqL3Et33RPpGQ7YkMofFDzCxUi57taLoUbYJRxvKAVpaQv5qMqcbz5e5qM9tvEQrk-OLhIAeXA7-v0RB9WMut50iex1gGdIkmGj-Gby1-QO386VXcB7kNmsJ6leOfnsajsg_SXQ1HoEJVWEtk7NHD_TdOqoTHTdavIC1ONIG6Oe5WdLk0foRGjKZ9SS) | |
---
Biden’s misguided leadership doesn’t stop at his handling of the economy. Joe repeatedly allowed his son, Hunter, to profit from his position as Vice President – landing a seat at the table at a Ukrainian energy company despite ZERO expertise in the field.

_We all know how that one ended!_

**This election is about something bigger than politics – it’s about the future of America hanging in the balance – and Joe Biden has proved that he is NOT the man for the job.**

Still, I need to know where you stand on this as we get closer to November. Do you think America would survive four years of Joe Biden?
[**Yes**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=72b3757566694d31b59b833ad81715ea&_e=CjpkZy5OKYjJGFa-VMkGDWGbFFQpbxZsnv_Q0drxvyB_QbQXEB3_QgAL_j27KWHzuf2N5TXsZEncMz6RcEhn7i_G31mXJORjAM-8jQQjqz1l9vQpq_M1BrOrWwTa26RLW_gx3GWAqQIgq_8FFLkvpJSOENQTpm_nij5NpwfAGO-0Dy1YhcP_9VxHX2x_YoUI67zVz5IaKDGHGaaVzqfOpF_CtUe9a0ce08EVs_CzIuAmauGHxM39Z2k4jIkWFPS-wzFiUqRkQ5il44JqbtEHktoTOUq3pdNrnaf9zRBZ2PRDifWZvM_Nml1pgvRddw0mNF6qKollQcgIr79qYAYNsbkUeSL642sIuB7I_wcYPAaSi4Jq4fzDW_Wn0-o24v030oA32X8aIQkHLRtFuYGcrKFx7hV0rLwLOjplSG1hZ5ebEq1auq-xLIrfH3M6rBVd1zpCydv2NQzl8QPIc862We0nRUDDIhXjvUbsCEebmBGVEIZVO-iEQJnZxAVtSBq_kmVVAR9GfLrks1_ncTpq98DmNFUWB8ui4sAceBx16Y9Pl9dTHfzvLGIPKyAqyoK6)
[**No**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=72b3757566694d31b59b833ad81715ea&_e=CjpkZy5OKYjJGFa-VMkGDWGbFFQpbxZsnv_Q0drxvyB_QbQXEB3_QgAL_j27KWHzuf2N5TXsZEncMz6RcEhn7i_G31mXJORjAM-8jQQjqz1l9vQpq_M1BrOrWwTa26RLW_gx3GWAqQIgq_8FFLkvpO7Ele-edZm3oXxb164edccu1lvksk0aUYl-5e79UCNvwB37s0YR6tELlmxCKYjgKncsYp4l8kncvpsdkeTyENomd52pNUsdH5zdLZh-k9NGfpF3wwpp_85C2-5v-x2qxLmXLUCKiHUh8YOK-_ypHLltRZ-3toY7hG9QnULGYNM0jBBxi_FYDkjOpD7nZbx1cFhEtC7VxXRGW6wgpoll9RFYF1_Y5YtX-R3RNkNQ8rLrq4YoTYAlxL4y_3DV66vFoc58QN7ccayj8eI6BlprWE7dZyc6qefUyDTaNG57CuQFMa4f94aOcrbTxrUZ2VrJXV2k9AQYuVcHvhDq4uN64ZK1kjQEgYMMAosEVOurW_igJuqzX90GW6b3D4Fxm8gij49TxIwo8kKPm2u6SLW1A_WDLP6c4i8a7ifRs-ITVYDy)
Thank you,

Darin LaHood

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 10 must-see moments from President Trump’s Mt. Rushmore speech
body:
President Trump visited Mount Rushmore on Friday, where he delivered “one of the best speeches of his Presidency," | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8402c31c45&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 6, 2020
---
| | |
# **10 must-see moments from President Trump’s Mt. Rushmore speech**

**President Trump** visited Mount Rushmore on Friday, where he delivered “one of the best speeches of his Presidency,” according to _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board.

🎬 [WATCH: Highlights from President Trump’s visit to Mt. Rushmore](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cf518086f6&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Contrary to the media reporting,** the America Mr. Trump described is one of genuine racial equality and diversity,” they continue. The President told the story of America through its many national heroes—presidents such as Washington and Lincoln, as well as other brave patriots such as Frederick Douglass and Martin Luther King Jr.

**“No nation has done more** to advance the human condition than the United States of America,” President Trump said. “And no people have done more to promote human progress than the citizens of our great nation.”

**Here are 10** of the top moments from his speech:
1. 🎬 [An eternal tribute to our forefathers.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=82520cb0b4&e=3ee4985eea) In contrast to the far-left mobs tearing down and desecrating monuments across our country, President Trump honored the lives of the four men whose faces are forever carved into Mount Rushmore.

2. 🎬 [America’s history will not be surrendered.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=76e1b73aa4&e=3ee4985eea) Anarchists and extremists “think the American people are weak, and soft, and submissive. But no—the American people are strong and proud, and they will not allow our country, and all of its values, history, and culture, to be taken from them.”

3. 🎬 [All men are created equal.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b67e6c5758&e=3ee4985eea) Fifty-six patriots, 244 years ago, set in motion “the unstoppable march of freedom” by stating boldly that “all men are created equal.”

4. 🎬 [Today, we set the record straight.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=46cd8a380e&e=3ee4985eea) “The radical view of American history is a web of lies—all perspective is removed, every virtue is obscured, every motive is twisted, every fact is distorted, and every flaw is magnified until the history is purged and the record is disfigured beyond all recognition.”

5. 🎬 [We will not be silenced.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f58a0482c5&e=3ee4985eea) “No person who remains quiet at the destruction of this resplendent heritage can possibly lead us to a better future,” President Trump said. No one who loves this country would seek to demolish its legacy.

6. 🎬 [Our children can achieve anything.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b7001170f5&e=3ee4985eea) “We will raise the next generation of American patriots . . . We will teach our children to know that they live in a land of legends, that nothing can stop them, and that no one can hold them down.”

7. 🎬 [Made in the holy image of God.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0b1f4ec40d&e=3ee4985eea) Americans believe in equal opportunity, equal justice, and equal treatment for every person. “Every child, of every color—born and unborn—is made in the holy image of God.”

8. 🎬 [A surprise announcement.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bfe3a14fad&e=3ee4985eea) President Trump announced the creation of a new national monument, the National Garden of American Heroes. It will be a vast outdoor park featuring statues of the greatest Americans who have ever lived.

9. 🎬 [The father of our country.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ba5900ae35&e=3ee4985eea) “From head to toe, George Washington represented the strength, grace, and dignity of the American people.”

10. 🎬 [The best is yet to come.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=52f3a95e05&e=3ee4985eea) “Centuries from now, our legacy will be the cities we built, the champions we forged, the good we did, and the monuments we created to inspire us all . . . America’s future is in our hands.”

[Press Secretary: Teaching our children to love America is not a “culture war.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5c93294ade&e=3ee4985eea)

**FULL SPEECH** : [Read President Trump’s full address from Mt. Rushmore](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=424e6970c1&e=3ee4985eea)

---
|
---
|

|
---

---

---

---

name: Hunt for Congress
subject: Honorable James A. Baker, III Endorses Wesley Hunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Honorable James A. Baker, III Endorses Wesley Hunt**

**Houston, TX** \- Today, the Wesley Hunt Campaign is honored to announce the endorsement of former U.S. Secretary of State James Baker of Wesley in his campaign to become the next Representative for Texas' 7th Congressional District. A Houston native, Secretary Baker's long and remarkable career in politics and public service can be traced back to his friendship with then-Congressman of the 7th District, George H. W. Bush. Secretary Baker led an unprecedented five presidential campaigns and is the only person to serve as White House Chief of Staff (for Presidents Reagan and George H. W. Bush), Secretary of the Treasury (for President Reagan), and Secretary of State (for President Bush).
_"Decades ago, my good friend President George H. W. Bush served as the Congressman for Texas’ 7th Congressional District,"_**said Baker.**_"His leadership in this district marked the beginning of an historic political career that would ultimately take him to the White House."

"Now, years later, I am glad to see a bright, promising candidate who has the ability to continue that legacy in the 7th District. Wesley Hunt will provide balanced, thoughtful, and formidable leadership as the Congressman for the 7th District."_

_"My decades of experience working in government have taught me a great deal about leadership. I have been fortunate to work alongside many of our Nation’s greatest leaders; men and women who shaped our history and effectively tackled the issues of their day. I sincerely believe that Wesley has the experience, skills and mentality to tackle current issues with the same attitude and effectiveness. I am proud to endorse his candidacy."_

Hunt released the following statement in response:

_"Through his extensive career of service to the United States, Secretary Baker has become a standard-bearer for leadership and diplomacy," said Hunt. "I am honored to receive Secretary Baker's endorsement in my campaign for Texas' 7th Congressional District, not only because of his outstanding career in politics, but also because of his deep ties to Houston and this district. I appreciate Secretary Baker's support as we work to restore real leadership in the 7th District."_

Wesley Hunt is a Houston native and a battle-tested leader willing to stand up for the 7th Congressional District. While his opponent Lizzie Fletcher made Pelosi Speaker of the House and refuses to condemn the most liberal of Democratic priorities, Wesley is a problem solver who will work with both sides to bring results home to the 7th District.
###

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=74c13f3d3396419588eeb65d0210b57d&_e=xpAW6vvEqCQHpLTC9ylrCHAFrTd0dErtjz5D5xNG-YKkk0NS-SXFxMqpXnjkgym9dYtvhQvSZ0k33JwRWJ6nzir3z-P7p4uDExNJEJG8fBJeW4fLv5nWyZ24dXM0SZ6rNRTevybAy-dGFAAUryYemP52DrJ8xLnVFCWHwuXW37S0MDi3cWk8YIKDH8m5yZo4vYpIHw_2o68LexmRx0B5oaFZQOoHt5-QhPLyt4lUxLsFER4gUn0Y4bzy2CjY5v5uc-OplZQ3xs20xR0BeMeiWr9q4DP1sGbX57Pi3ORNPhE%3D)****

name: Team Joe
subject: Did you see what we did in June, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We outraised Trump and the Republicans for the second month in a row. |
---
Peter, in case you missed the big news:

**FIRST:** We set a goal to reach 3,000,000 donations last quarter to power this grassroots campaign.

**THEN:** We not only surpassed that goal, we also _outraised Trump and the Republicans_ for the second month in a row, with 68% of our online donations coming from first-time donors!

**BUT NOW:** We have to face the fact that, even though we raised $141 million last month to Trump and the Republicans' $131 million, they still have a huge cash-on-hand advantage.

Each month we outraise Trump, the closer we get to closing the fundraising gap. Grassroots supporters like you power this campaign, Peter, and we need you with us to make sure we keep growing this campaign like never before. So, we're asking:

body:
Sen. Cornyn has help from the gun lobby, the private detention industry, and the insurance and pharmaceutical industries.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890149/7f51f7bc/41126652/4ef60107/3984891995/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

---
Peter -- Want an idea of the kind of big money we're up against? The last Senate race here in Texas cost over $100 MILLION. And now that Texas is officially a battleground state, you can bet the special interests will be spending BIG this year!

Sen. Cornyn has already raised a staggering amount of money, thanks to help from corporate PACs and a slew of special interests like **the gun lobby, the private detention industry, and the insurance and pharmaceutical industries.** It's no wonder he's spent so long putting their interests ahead of the needs of working Texas families!
**[PITCH IN TO HELP MJ FIGHT BACK!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890149/7f51f7bc/41126652/4ef60106/3984891995/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2NzQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200706.2nd__1674__&amount=10")**
Things are more urgent this year -- with the runoff pushed back, there's going to be even less time to campaign in a general election. It's crucial that we come out of the runoff with the resources to _immediately_ fight back against the big-money attacks from Sen. Cornyn and get MJ's message out to the **34% of Texas voters who are undecided.**

And unlike Sen. Cornyn, MJ isn't taking money from corporate PACs. She's counting on our team of over 56,000 donors (who've pitched in an average online donation of $23 at a time) to build the grassroots movement we need to _win_ in November.

**Will you join our team by making your first donation* today to help us fight back against Cornyn 's big money and flip the Senate on Election Day?**

Thanks,
Team MJ

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
We can’t afford this failed leadership anymore. We’ve all paid the price for sending Brindisi to DC and that price keeps going up with every new r [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3f17ade7e1d4478a87345868fedca584&_e=tsD0Gxyq6qNbN-JhAMIPLn6uANmTiLzV2kkgMBnqQTblGPtYlJ0jMRlDvim7UFEiILcebTIyBcuVKe7OzqPq17H3UzFV2lqK1lf-pnH5xymGJ-8hbwtRcyutHTsPoHLmNaOWY9HwWz9bTsLl43IumdRTMhxH8ZNm_cG3yXQxbOCuNj2bRuWRK4cksb7EmwJBQC5M6RHSgFImLnr2z7tDvZfAXVetjO59dtsJSvs0VEYFMBqyKq9hfqTOlFpxgNDVmSHOZBCevrDHOnIn-NfcBfjeO421I_7htrMQstbFnhFBqKcKWMuvVqWdEQbdM_LousgSo1j0aY8U2mFF2-BxXzHWtSPNt-ThyFZyMkghvplLl0A1CwtmfMnT0jyQ306rIOahKrNFUrI6FxjlVqU6WgaKQ5OrYoG_qasZE4FopBYX1fId20pX0gO6CSqn_FCLOhgWL3N6BP3vyQAkNSx1XOcqrbevSkkve-UcoGU8YYc%3D) Friend, Remember when Anthony Brindisi promised voters in our district that he would take on Spectrum once he got to Washington?
That campaign promise bought him thousands of votes in 2018 – and we’re STILL waiting for him to deliver on that promise.
**NY-22’s Spectrum customers have endured FIVE new rate hikes since Brindisi took office – and Spectrum shows no sign of slowing down while Brindisi shows no sign of delivering on his empty promises.** [**ADD YOUR NAME: HOLD BRINDISI ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3f17ade7e1d4478a87345868fedca584&_e=tsD0Gxyq6qNbN-JhAMIPLn6uANmTiLzV2kkgMBnqQTblGPtYlJ0jMRlDvim7UFEiILcebTIyBcuVKe7OzqPq17H3UzFV2lqK1lf-pnH5xymGJ-8hbwtRcyutHTsPoHLmNaOWY9HwWz9bTsLl43IumdRTMhxH8ZNm_cG3yXQxbOCuNj2bRuWRK4cksb7EmwJBQC5M6RHSgFImLnr2z7tDvZfAXVetjO59dtsJSvs0VEYFMBqyKq9hfqTOlFpxgNDVmSHOZBCevrDHOnIn-NfcBXkOJjhOQ3iGv0ZOm0ygFmB_Tg91LmW7S7VDhef-p_IaS8ErERkcgn98hUHZXiKXeIogkqC-JnwT97f9iWoQpzz26ZK9y_18CwNDS5GGnhKwQfNLnyIKQga2zNElVc5DkzDMY_2kgzsRbU-CYcsYVRqcGq1GMv6uhpsvcvPIwUHDx_laY2ePVNM4CUbilKDAmeDBv2tMKFNJQw6C4Dkn2yg%3D) These five rate hikes are more than just simple rate hikes.
_They represent five more broken promises from Phony Tony, and five more reasons to vote him out on November 3rd!_
**Brindisi’s failure to deliver on a key campaign promise is affecting the bottom line of NY-22’s small businesses, schools, and families that rely on Spectrum’s services.**
We can’t afford this failed leadership anymore. We’ve all paid the price for sending him to Washington, and that price keeps going up with every new rate hike!
Brindisi needs to know that we haven’t forgotten about his empty promises, and we’re going to make sure he knows that on November 3rd! [**ADD YOUR NAME: HOLD BRINDISI ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3f17ade7e1d4478a87345868fedca584&_e=tsD0Gxyq6qNbN-JhAMIPLn6uANmTiLzV2kkgMBnqQTblGPtYlJ0jMRlDvim7UFEiILcebTIyBcuVKe7OzqPq17H3UzFV2lqK1lf-pnH5xymGJ-8hbwtRcyutHTsPoHLmNaOWY9HwWz9bTsLl43IumdRTMhxH8ZNm_cG3yXQxbOCuNj2bRuWRK4cksb7EmwJBQC5M6RHSgFImLnr2z7tDvZfAXVetjO59dtsJSvs0VEYFMBqyKq9hfqTOlFpxgNDVmSHOZBCevrDHOnIn-NfcBUj8DOPX2F0t_wtFztyvjwE1liOsVrFXXYC_-Kd1TvBUyXn5YxoearlSI65dkuXdX97ZPsTwr1v1OXXSe9cJKVOJJDz5ZqA_bR2S2RkhgeBMdbV-oO9cNbn5pjtBofqYVt6Qcr1nktcvxosETLe3qdWG4ywwwbMJWyMfzPKOY-WHYToNzmPUlhlmxjfdPrhhUE04y4MXfSNvq2Uvwpgr3yE%3D) Thank you for fighting with me, Claudia Tenney |

name: Christy Smith
subject: COVID relief is about to expire. Tell the Senate to pass the Heroes Act NOW >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

On July 1st, during the worst unemployment crisis since the Great Depression, rent came due for millions of people across the nation.

Right now, too many families are struggling to keep a roof over their heads and put food on the table because of the coronavirus pandemic -- and Republicans in Congress are refusing to act.

**Our people _need help_. Our communities need more support to get through this crisis, because despite Republicans' wishful thinking, the pandemic is far from over.**

Some coronavirus relief legislation has already begun to expire, leaving folks who have lost their jobs or had their hours cut in the lurch. In May, House Democrats passed an important relief package -- the Heroes Act -- that will help us save jobs while prioritizing protecting lives. We need the Senate to pass this legislation now, but Mitch McConnell has _refused_ to take it up.

**[We're starting a petition demanding McConnell call a vote on the Heroes Act -- and urge his Republican colleagues to pass it. Click here to sign on and add your support today.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bafe/29776869/9f8a759/569eebb1/432680360/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDZfaGVyb2VzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_heroes?source=em20_200706_heroes-full")** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bafe/29776869/9f8a759/569eebb1/432680360/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDZfaGVyb2VzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_heroes?source=em20_200706_heroes-full") Not only are Republicans like Mike Garcia downplaying the severity of our public health crisis, but they're also refusing to act to save local businesses, help people pay their bills, and keep our people safe.

Among its other provisions, the Heroes Act will extend pandemic unemployment benefits through next year, extend hazard pay to essential workers, and provide funding for coronavirus testing, tracing, and treatment. **This legislation is essential to our country's economic recovery and to keeping people safe as we combat the pandemic.**

The Senate has had _more than a month and a half_ to pass the Heroes Act, and they're still stalling now, even as coronavirus case numbers spike once again, and rent comes due another month.

We can't afford to wait for a second wave to pass another relief package -- not when the first wave is still upon us. **Our leaders need to act now.**

**[If you agree, please take a moment and add your name to our petition calling on McConnell to pass the Heroes Act immediately.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bafe/29776869/9f8a759/569eebb1/432680360/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDZfaGVyb2VzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_heroes?source=em20_200706_heroes-full")** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bafe/29776869/9f8a759/569eebb1/432680360/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDZfaGVyb2VzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_heroes?source=em20_200706_heroes-full") Thank you,

Christy

|
[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bafe/29776869/9f8a759/569eebb2/432680360/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDZfaGVyb2VzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200706_heroes-full")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bafe/29776869/9f8a759/569eebb3/432680360/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDZfaGVyb2VzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200706_heroes-full")

name: Team Hagerty
subject: ICYMI: Majority Leader Lamberth Releases Editorial Endorsing Bill Hagerty
body:
Peter,Majority Leader William Lamberth released an editorial in the Tennessee Star _ _ endorsing Bill Hagerty's campaign to represent Tennessee in the U.S. Senate. In the editorial, **Lamberth writes,** "In the U.S. Senate, Bill will continue all of our work to rebuild the economy, continue to stand up to Communist China and stand with our law enforcement officers. No one will fight harder for our Tennessee values than my friend, Bill, and I am proud to join President Trump in supporting him for the U.S. Senate. This November, let's re-elect President Trump and send Bill Hagerty to the Senate."[**READ THE OP-ED**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-piyhdjl-fuutjhhtj-r/) [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-piyhdjl-fuutjhhtj-y/) See More Content Like This **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-piyhdjl-fuutjhhtj-j/)** | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-piyhdjl-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-piyhdjl-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-piyhdjl-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-piyhdjl-fuutjhhtj-u/)
